The search did confirm the existence of a South American scientist with research on abscisic acid, programmed cell death, extremophile plants, and a daughter named Julieta, who published a 2016 paper mentioning radiocarbon-dated excavation objects. However, the specific details required (age in years and full name) were not found in the available snippets.
